{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Dreadgod attacks
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The scene reminds [[Pride]] of the [[Dreadgod attacks]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
